sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.1)(value) AS low_quantile FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) AS event_month, quantileExactLow(0.5)(value) AS median_value FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_month;
SELECT id, quantileExactLow(0.7)(value) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date)) AS day_70_quantile FROM test_dates;

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM toDate(event_date)) AS event_year, quantileExactLow(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) / 12.0)(value) AS monthly_quantile FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_year;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.5)(num) AS median_value FROM test_numbers WHERE num IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXTRACT(SECOND FROM now()) AS current_second, quantileExactLow(0.25)(num) + 1.5 AS adjusted_value FROM test_numbers;
SELECT id, event_date, quantileExactLow(0.1)(value) FROM test_dates WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_date) = 0;
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.9)(IF(value IS NULL, 0, value)) AS high_quantile_non_null FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, quantileExactLow(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) / 12.0)(value) AS monthly_quantile FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries, quantileExactLow(0.5)(value) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < now() GROUP BY EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date);
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.01)(value) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS low_quantile_ordered FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, quantileExactLow(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) / 12.0)(value) AS adjusted_monthly_quantile FROM test_dates HAVING adjusted_monthly_quantile IS NOT NULL;
